mapper.select: select user_id, user_no, nick_name, avatar, mobile, status, invite_code, inviter_user_id, activate_status, activate_time, create_time, update_time from ai_c_user where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_user (user_no, nick_name, avatar, mobile, status, invite_code, inviter_user_id, activate_status, activate_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{userNo}, #{nickName}, #{avatar}, #{mobile}, #{status}, #{inviteCode}, #{inviterUserId}, #{activateStatus}, #{activateTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update ai_c_user set nick_name = #{nickName}, avatar = #{avatar}, mobile = #{mobile}, status = #{status}, invite_code = #{inviteCode}, inviter_user_id = #{inviterUserId}, activate_status = #{activateStatus}, activate_time = #{activateTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where user_id = #{userId}
